features: Angled Bristles for Flawless Application - The angled brush head allows for a more precise and contoured application. The angled bristles conform perfectly to the curves of your face, providing a seamless and natural finish.

High-Quality Synthetic Fibers - Made from premium synthetic fibers, these makeup brushes are soft, gentle on the skin, and cruelty-free. They guarantee a smooth and comfortable application experience.

Superior Durability and Design - TEOYALL makeup brushes are long-lasting and can withstand regular use and cleaning without shedding or losing their shape. Brush bristles are easy to clean and maintain, ensuring good hygiene.

Ergonomic Design - The handles of these brushes are made from a high-quality wooden material, coated with a sleek black finish. Not only do they provide a comfortable grip, but they also add a touch of elegance to your makeup collection.

Versatile Makeup Brush - With its soft and synthetic bristles, our brush ensures a seamless application for both liquid, cream and powder products. Whether you're working with foundation, blush, bronzer, or eyeshadow, this multi-purpose brush is flexible enough to adapt to any texture.
